content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Help     Financial assistance   Financial assistance   Having trouble making your repayments? We’re here to help.    We're here to help   If you’re struggling with your finances, it’s important that you reach out to us as soon as you can. Financial difficulty can happen to anyone. If you’ve had an unplanned life event like unemployment or reduced income, a relationship breakdown or domestic violence, a natural disaster, illness or injury or if you just need some temporary support, we can help.    Short term help    If you’ve had some unexpected expenses recently and you’ve missed a payment, or if you think you might miss a payment soon, please get in touch with us so we can help.    Call Customer Assist   If you’re a personal bank customer, speak to us for support that’s specific to you.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 8:00pm (AEST/AEDT) Saturday, 9:00am to 1:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    Within Australia: 1300 661 114    Call Business Assist   For small business and commercial cards within Australia, speak to us about getting support.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 6:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    Within Australia: 1300 881 661    Long term assistance    If your circumstances have changed and it’s impacting your ability to keep up with your payments on an ongoing basis, please contact our Customer Care team as soon as you can for assistance.    Call Customer Care   If you’re a personal bank customer, we can help find a solution that’s right for your circumstances.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 8:00pm (AEST/AEDT) Saturday, 9:00am to 1:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    Within Australia: 1800 701 599    Request hardship support   Call Business Customer Care   For small business and commercial cards within Australia, we can help tailor a solution to your needs.    Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 5:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    Within Australia: 1300 961 577    If you would like to add a third party authority to your accounts, you can complete a Letter of Authority (LOA) (PDF, 104KB), opens in new window     with your representative.    Customers with Business Lending    If you are a business customer and have been contacted by our NAB Assist Business Solutions team, please get in touch.      Call Business Solutions   For customers with business lending    Monday to Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm (AEST/AEDT)    Within Australia: ​1300 392 545    Easy English hardship information plan   Our hardship information is available as an Easy English version.    Hardship information Easy English version (PDF, 2MB) , opens in new window   How we'll support you   Difficulty making your home loan payments?   If you’re having trouble making home loan payments, we can support you.    Difficulty making your credit card or personal loan payments?   If you can’t make your credit card of personal loan payments, we have support options available.    Financial hardship for business   If you think you might miss a payment, or believe you’re in financial difficulty, there are ways we can help.    Extra care support services   When you need more than financial support.    Customer Care Kit   A guide to trusted organisations that offer free financial counselling services and community support.    Financial hardship due to gambling   If your financial hardship is caused by gambling, contact NAB Assist on 1800 701 599 and our team can talk you through your options. This might include the option to restrict gambling transactions on your NAB cards.    Support in times of need   Disaster relief and support   NAB Ready Together can help if you’re affected by a natural disaster.    Unplanned life moments   Sometimes things don’t go to plan. Divorce, illness or job loss can be unexpected. Here are some tools and guides to help.    Financial wellbeing   Discover ways to ease cost of living pressures, manage finances and improve your financial wellbeing.    Get in touch   Visit a NAB branch   Visit us in person at your nearest NAB branch or business banking centre.    Find a NAB branch   Give us feedback   Help us improve your banking experience. Give us your feedback or make a complaint.    Give us feedback   Interpreters available   Do you have limited English or prefer to speak in a language other than English? When you call us, just say “I need an interpreter” and we’ll arrange for someone to help with your enquiry.    If you don’t see your language listed, please ask us for help to find someone who speaks your language to help with your banking.      普通话    한국어     Italiano , opens in new window    日本語   View more languages   National Relay Service   If you’re d/Deaf or find it hard to hear or speak to hearing people on the phone, the National Relay Service, opens in new window    can help. To contact NAB give our phone number 13 22 65 to the National Relay Service operator when asked.      National Relay Service phone numbers and links , opens in new window    National Relay Service options    Learn more about accessibility at NAB   Important information    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.    Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.
